rationale.fidelity: Preserves the shared maintenance-routing decisions, feasible set, objective, and distinct heuristic and exact outputs.
rationale.managerial_framing: States the latency-quality-assurance tension and missing deadline and certificate-action pathway, though some details are repeated and the operational counterfactual is not crisply stated.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly claim is made, and absent literature and experimental support are acknowledged.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Treats both managerial value pathways as conditional hypotheses and rejects field-performance and universal-exactness claims.
rationale.prose_clarity: The core answer is clear but buried in repetitive diagnostic scaffolding and affected by encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: A strong, cautious same-model comparison whose main deficiencies are verbosity and slight managerial diffuseness.
